title: Strong Paper Plates (9inch - 50 Pack) – 100% Compostable Disposable Plates – Heavy Duty Natural Sugarcane Eco-Friendly Biodegradable Plastic Free Bagasse Party Plate – Microwave & Freezer Safe
features: 𝐒𝐓𝐔𝐑𝐃𝐘 𝟗-𝐈𝐍𝐂𝐇 𝐏𝐀𝐏𝐄𝐑 𝐏𝐋𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐒 (𝐁𝐀𝐆𝐀𝐒𝐒𝐄): Strong and reliable, these 9-inch compostable paper plates made from bagasse are ideal for BBQs, buffets, large meals, and side dishes. Perfect for parties, weddings, catering, restaurants, food trucks, takeaway orders, festivals, and daily meals at home.

𝟏𝟎𝟎% 𝐒𝐔𝐆𝐀𝐑𝐂𝐀𝐍𝐄 𝐅𝐈𝐁𝐑𝐄 (𝐓𝐑𝐄𝐄-𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐄): Made from bagasse, a natural by-product of sugarcane, these plates are renewable, biodegradable, eco-friendly, and completely tree-free. A plastic-free alternative to traditional paper plates without compromising strength.

𝟏𝟎𝟎% 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 (𝐀𝐒𝐓𝐌 𝐃𝟔𝟒𝟎𝟎/𝐃𝟔𝟖𝟔𝟖): Certified to meet compostability standards, these biodegradable plates safely break down in municipal or commercial composting facilities. A sustainable disposable solution that reduces landfill waste and benefits the planet.

𝐇𝐎𝐓 & 𝐂𝐎𝐋𝐃 𝐅𝐎𝐎𝐃 𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄: Heavy-duty design that is oil-resistant, water-resistant, and cut-resistant. Suitable for hot foods such as curries, rice, pasta, meat, full meals, salads, fruit, or desserts. Contains no plastic or wax lining, making them safe for all types of meals.

𝐌𝐈𝐂𝐑𝐎𝐖𝐀𝐕𝐄 & 𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐄𝐙𝐄𝐑 𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄: Designed for convenience, these disposable plates can go from freezer to microwave without warping. Perfect for reheating large portions, storing food, or serving fresh meals at parties, BBQs, catering events, and corporate functions
